detail_desc:
At first glance, this man would not seem to even hurt a fly.  As you look
closer, you notice a long scar running down the left side of his face.  You
think that perhaps looks can be deceiving and that you might not want to mess
with him.
long_desc: Kire, the patrol captain, is walking here.

detail_desc:
She is rather plain, wearing her hair up in a bun, and she's dressed,
well...  Plain.
long_desc: A commoner is here searching for goods.

detail_desc:
The boy is caked in dirt, and smells of dead fish.  You may want to give him
a few coins just to go away.
long_desc: A street rat is here, begging for food.

detail_desc:
The man is uninteresting, except for his dirty turban, which seems unusually
large.
long_desc: A peddler tries to do business with you.

detail_desc: He looks to be a kind, jovial man.  But I wouldn't test it.
long_desc: A guardsman patrols the streets and shops of McGintey Cove.

detail_desc: She notices you looking and smiles at you.
long_desc: A toll booth worker is here, taking your fare for crossing into the city.

detail_desc:
This man looks as if there could be no other place he'd rather be then here
at this inn, serving drinks and making everyone's food.
long_desc: Jon the barkeep is here serving dinner and drinks.

detail_desc: Such a bright and cheery lady, she beams a happy smile at you.
long_desc: The receptionist waits patiently for you to decide on a room.

detail_desc:
She looks so pathetically blonde, you are almost afraid to ask for any
assistance.
long_desc: Cindii the Info Lady sits behind the desk, smiling happily.

detail_desc: Samuel looks like he may have poured a few extra tonight.
long_desc: Samuel himself is here, pouring the drinks and getting rich.

detail_desc: Be careful.  No sudden moves.  You know how these guys get....
long_desc: A postal worker is here, ready to send or get your mail.

detail_desc: He's got that money-hungry glint in his eyes.  Watch your wallet.
long_desc: Juan the potion pusher is here, trying sell you some potions.

detail_desc: She almost didn't notice you come in, so focused on her craft was she.
long_desc: Alandra the jewelry maker is here, working on some pieces.

detail_desc:
He looks quite competent, quite relaxed.  He must make a good living in
spite of his reputation.
long_desc: The armorer waits patiently to help you.

detail_desc:
Shellee is quite an attractive woman, however you notice that she lacks a
bit upstairs.  Yes, she is blonde.
long_desc: Shellee waits here, hoping to find good homes for her little friends.

detail_desc:
Man, this guy is ALWAYS taking a break.  Must be because he sells no
weaponry.
long_desc: Jak the weaponsmith is here, currently taking a break.

detail_desc: Poor guy looks a little bored - must be the only job available in town.
long_desc: A clerk is here, waiting to take your money.

detail_desc:
She looks like she's come a long way to sell her goods in this famous market
place.
long_desc: Pauletra the pottery woman stands next to her cart, selling her goods.

detail_desc: Kind of makes you wonder if Herb was always his name, doesn't it?
long_desc: Herb stands here.  Know what he's selling?

detail_desc: Bones has all kinds of strange bone-made jewelry hanging from his body.
long_desc: Bones stands here, selling his exotic jewelry.

detail_desc: Although tired, she looks very happy.
long_desc: Farah has a nice little booth set up to display her wares.

detail_desc: Just a normal, average, every day country bumpkin.
long_desc: A farmer stands next to cart selling fresh vegetables.

detail_desc: Numerous little burn scars mark his hands.  Dangerous job, this man has.
long_desc: A man is here selling candles.

detail_desc:
This guy...  There's something fishy about him...  Get it?  Fishy?  You
know, he's a fisherman, and...  Forget it.
long_desc: A fisherman sells good quality fish fresh from the sea.

detail_desc:
She looks like a world traveler, one who has seen and been almost
everywhere.
long_desc: A glass blower is here, her items carefully stacked on portable wooden shelf.

detail_desc: Big, strong with hands as big as sledgehammers.
long_desc: A carpenter is here, selling his woodwork.

detail_desc:
The man wears a very fine looking cape.  You notice that his isn't for sale,
it must be a special one.
long_desc: Darva, the cape maker, is here with his many fine threads for sale.

detail_desc: This cleric looks quite at peace with himself, tranquil even.
long_desc: A robed man with the power to heal stands here, hands folded before him.

detail_desc: Clad all in leather, this guy looks like he could be friend or foe.
long_desc: The Leatherman stands next to his cart, his many leather goods for sale.

detail_desc:
Sipping her cool drink, you cannot help but feel just a bit jealous of her
comfort and ease.
long_desc: Shantar sits under an umbrella, relaxing as she sells an assortment of rings.

detail_desc:
Shades wears a pair of the blackest sunglasses you have ever seen.  Kind of
makes him look a bit sinister, you know - cool.  I think that was his intended
effect there.
long_desc: Shades the eyewear man displays his assortment of eyepieces and glasses.

detail_desc:
This huge man seems very out of place here in the middle of this bazaar,
where he is forced to remain in one spot.
long_desc: A blacksmith sells assorted daggers here.

detail_desc: This huge guy seems quite comfortable relaxing and selling his goods.
long_desc: A man is here selling various burlap goods.

detail_desc: She has a whole lot of scarves, a whole lot.  Buy one.
long_desc: A woman is here selling scarves.

detail_desc: The is wearing like ten hats on his own head.  What a goof.
long_desc: A man is here with stacks and stacks of hats, all of them for sale.

detail_desc:
This elf has the look of one who has been down a few rocky roads in his
time.  His mistrust of most everyone is quite apparent.
long_desc: An elven vendor is here offering an assortment of drinking vessels.

detail_desc:
It is quite obvious that she loves her vocation from the look of enormous
pride on her face.
long_desc: A baker stands proudly next to her fine baked goods.

detail_desc:
This man is so large, he almost seems intimidating enough to MAKE you buy
something.
long_desc: A very large man stands next to his display case.

detail_desc: This stocky little guy has arms that look like miniature tree trunks.
long_desc: A dwarven smith stands here selling helms.

detail_desc:
She sure looks comfortable.  In fact, she looks as if she might even be a
bit sleepy.  Her eyelids droop and she has this sloppy grin on her face.
long_desc: Shalaylia sits peacefully, selling rolling papers to any who are in need.

detail_desc:
You have to wonder just what type of potions she is selling, the way she is
huddled into this far corner of the bazaar.
long_desc: Sazaindin the mage rests comfortably here, ready to brew you a potion.

detail_desc: She smiles prettily at you and thanks you for stopping by.
long_desc: The lease manager is here, ready to take your application.

detail_desc: Tall, thin, and wiry.
long_desc: The jeweler stands behind the counter waiting to help you.

detail_desc:
A fairly pleasant looking person stands before you wearing a white coat.
They seem eager to get your business, and take care of whatever wounds you may
have.
long_desc: A physician is here, ready to tend to your wounds.

detail_desc:
She looks quite exhausted, as you see a bead of sweat roll her face.  The
leather apron she's wearing is caked in soot, and doesn't appear to be in a
good mood, so you should better hurry up with whatever you want.
long_desc: Aelsa, one of Fatima's full timers, is here working on some boots.

detail_desc: He looks like a nice young man.  A man who never cheats his customers.
long_desc: Randon stands ready to sell you a scroll or two.

detail_desc:
From the way this guy runs around this place, you would think it was all he
ever wanted out of life.
long_desc: Curley hustles about the room, tending to his customers in a very timely fashion.

detail_desc:
An overweight man looks at you with pleading eyes, begging you to buy
something to liven up his day.
long_desc: Tephe, the water guy, sits on a stool behind a counter, twiddling his fingers.

detail_desc:
He looks up and tells you that if you need anything just ask.  Then he goes
back to his sewing.
long_desc: A man sits at a desk patiently sewing a pair of leather gauntlets.

detail_desc:
You can tell this man knows what he's doing when it comes to sales.  He's
almost gotten you to buy several of his items more than a few times.
long_desc: A merchant stands here trying to persuade you to buy his goods.

detail_desc: They seem eager to find something to spend their money on.
long_desc: A local youth walks by, looking for something.

detail_desc:
WHOOA!  The bird just tried to attack you, better give it some food
before...  Ooops...  It just shit on your boots.
long_desc: A gull flits about, pecking the ground for dropped food.

detail_desc: A large, white bird rests its wings from a long flight.
long_desc: An albatross rests on a nearby post.

detail_desc:
A silhouette of a man lurks in the distance, you can' tell much about him
except that he is avoiding being seen.
long_desc: You see McHale, the patrol lieutenant, out of the corner of your eye.

detail_desc:
She is a hefty guard, but make no mistake that doesn't set her back.  She
peers in your direction, making sure you have no plans of doing any harm.  She
smiles and you can see chunks of her last "victim" in her teeth, you turn away
quickly in disgust.
long_desc: Sergeant Tess, the Bazaar overseer, stands ready for any trouble.

detail_desc:
They look vibrant and full of life as if never even seen any action in their
entire lives.
long_desc: A young deputy is here.

detail_desc:
Though this cat has a wild look in its eyes, it waits here patiently for
something to happen.
long_desc: A fearless wildcat is waiting here patiently.

detail_desc:
This beautiful winged creature is faithful only to it's master.  Don't mess
with it, it may decide to peck your eyes out!
long_desc: A hawk waits faithfully for an order to be given.

detail_desc:
His manner and bearing are both that of a perfect gentleman and
professional.  It seems the Mage's Guild in this town must have a hard time
making the rent payment, so they rely heavily on the business from this shop to
support most of their payment.
long_desc: A man in a Mage's Guild robe awaits to teleport you to your desired locale.

detail_desc:
She smiles charmingly at you and says, 'I can get you to the Newbie
Headquarters in a snap - just type NEWBIE and you will be instantly
transported.  '
long_desc: Alaantra the Newbie Helper is here, helping newbies go to the Newbie Headquarters.

detail_desc:
He sneers a welcome at you and asks in a nasal voice if he might be able to
help you.
long_desc: The city banker waits impatiently behind the counter.
